---
title: "‘Patient Leaves.’ Unsigned."
---

## ‘Patient Leaves.’ Unsigned.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1901
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (April 1901)  136-7.

### Notes

This series \'Leaves for the Months\' is identified as by Yonge in the obituary in <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (April 1901).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
